---
title: "ISSS608-VAA"
format: html
---

Welcome to ISSS608 **Visual Analytics and Applications** homepage. In this website, you will find my coursework prepared for this course.



::: {.callout-note}
## AI Disclosure
This project was developed with the assistance of **Gemini (AI)** as a learning co-pilot. AI was utilized to clarify technical concepts in R, debug code chunks, and assist with Quarto formatting..
:::
